do_not_claim: Paradox-grade HRE / Bohemian Crown / Jagiellon microborders
legal 1444 frontiers — hints are illustrative for the historical sniff test

priority_region.label: Central Europe
priority_region.notes: M20 second priority region. Habsburg / Bohemian Crown / Poland-Lithuania / Hungarian frontier readability for 1444. Outside these modern ISO parents, scaffold geometry is retained.

source_notes: Curator-authored soft frontier bands and sample hard overrides for M20 broader period geometry.
Not derived from proprietary game maps. Not a full OpenHistoricalMap extract.
Hard overrides target sample_* province IDs (sample_at_*, sample_cz_*, sample_pl_*, sample_hu_*); they skip cleanly on full Natural Earth builds.
Soft boundary hints are geographic and apply on any scaffold that intersects the priority region.
